title: Horror Ambience Music 2: Forgotten Tunes
description: This Resource pack replaces all of minecraft's music with dark atmospheric suspenseful music
body:
![HAM FT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c04cfa2562ce81931b834c6b3e94677ee93eb144_0.webp)

This Resource pack replaces all of minecrafts music with dark atmospheric suspenseful music
aiming for more subtle music with slow buildup's other than loud blaring cheap horror music

**This is a successor to Horror Ambience Music: Echoes**

**Focusing on a more Silent Hill style of atmospheric music**

# **Preview**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/B2WFuBJBF44" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
